PRO_CUL_1091.description_text:
전시정보


Book an English Guided Tour




A Docent is available to provide a guided exhibition tour of the MMCA collection, highlight works from ongoing exhibitions.

Online registration is required in advance.

Free with museum admission(need to buy ticket before program starts).




ㅇ Period: 2023. Sep. 7.- Sep. 27.

ㅇ Time: weekdays, 11:00AM – 12:00PM

ㅇ Venue: MMCA Seoul

ㅇ Meeting Point: Museum Lobby

ㅇ Contact: MMCA Education Department (+82-2-3701-9617, jil5181@korea.kr)




* Photos can be taken during the program for education and archiving purposes.

* Participants with commercial purposes cannot register.

* This program will be held if at least 5 people register.

* Please register 2days before the program date.

* The program's contents and schedule are subject to change due to various circumstances.
